name: @forgeax/hello-bloom
description: Bloom post-processing opt-in exemplar (feat-20260531-bloom-first-declarative-render-graph-pass / M4 / w18).

forgeax._comment: smokeInvocation = self-contained SSOT. hello-bloom exercises Camera bloom columns end-to-end (bright-pass -> blur-H -> blur-V -> composite -> tonemap).

fps.reason: fps no-regression covered by hello-cube / hello-room / hello-app gates that run the default zero-overhead path; Bloom opt-in cost is verified via the smoke gate (structural-only) rather than per-app fps sampling

bench.reason: Bloom opt-in exemplar; vitest bench focus stays on @forgeax/engine-math + @forgeax/engine-runtime#transparent-sort
